subject: Ecosystem Intel: Robust Expansion in AgriTech, AI, and Deep Science Funding (March 2026)
aiIntro: Ecosystem Intelligence Update: This intelligence brief covers the entire Indian Funding and AgriTech Ecosystem for the month of March 2026. The period indicates robust expansion, with 46 new programs identified and no reported closures. Key themes emerging from this scan include a significant emphasis on AgriTech, advanced AI applications, deep science, and sustainable technologies, largely propelled by government schemes and international collaborations.
